title: Classic American Buttermilk Waffles
description: A traditional breakfast recipe featuring crispy waffles, fluffy on the inside, made with buttermilk and a hint of richness.
instructions: Preheat your waffle iron according to the manufacturer's instructions.
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, buttermilk, melted butter, and vanilla extract.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, whisking until just combined.
The batter should still be slightly lumpy.
Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the center of the waffle iron and spread it out to the edges.
Cook the waffle for 3-5 minutes, or until it's golden brown and crispy.
Repeat with the remaining batter, greasing the waffle iron with cooking spray as needed.
